item.title: About
item.description: I started this blog to get a trace of my work, discoveries and more about my journey in programming. Also I want to share music, pictures and global things about my life and how I see my future in life. I got this template idea from Macawls, which is an awsome dude, you should definitely check his work and his own blog: I hope I will have some fun posting here :) (and some sleep soon).

item.title: First post 👋
item.description: Hey, first post on my blog :) go check my about page : https://matthiasbrat.dev/about/
